responses.thoughts:
**A Deep Dive into the Post-Performance Chatter**

Okay, so the task is clear: I need to generate subtitles for this video clip of Kiara and Bae's post-performance chat. It's from #KiaraBday2024 (or is it 2026? Hmm, the hashtag says 2026, the logo says 2024, ah well...) and I need to transcribe their dialogue, ensuring the timings are perfect. Let's do this step-by-step.

Here's how my mind processes the video:

The clip starts with cheers and screams. "Woo!" they yell. "Here we go!" Bae chirps, Kiara exclaims "Yeah!" and "Oh my God!" she says. Welcome back! Both are saying "Hi!" and "Kiara, Happy Birthday!" from Bae. Then "Thank you!" from Kiara. She expresses it's not just her birthday but a celebration with both together dancing, such an occasion! It's unclear how they got to this occasion, Kiara asks Bae to introduce herself.

Bae begins, "What's up? I am Chaos, the concept of, and a steward trapped in a cage of vice, your best friend Hakos Baelz from Hololive English -Promise-. Witness me!"

Kiara retorts with such a good introduction. She wishes she had such an intro. Kiara welcomes everyone and asks Bae how she liked the song.

"It was so hard!" Bae declares. "Yeah, really?" Kiara retorts. "Our first idol dances" she continues. Kiara reiterates "This is so hard!"

Bae: "Yeah, that happens often in Hello! Project, but... I don't understand this." Kiara then reminisces of dance lessons. She also remembers the different dance genres that appeared. Bae expresses that there was a lot of house. Kiara asks "This is house?". Bae replies with "House, okay..." She continues to mention locking. Kiara states "Oh, this? You said that's rock?". Bae affirms that "This is locking."

Kiara asks, "Lock, locking?". Bae: "Locking, locking." Kiara: "Oh, you meant locking, not rocking?". Bae: "No, locking. Misunderstanding." Kiara states that she thought that was a rock dance style, okay. Bae replies "No, locking."

Bae then says again "Yeah, that was so hard!" and Kiara states that she knows. Bae expresses that she was so surprised. She says that she was like "What kind of idol dance has house and locking in the same dance?" That's crazy!

Kiara states that they were trying all kinds of things back then. She affirms that it's from her favorite idol group, Berryz Kobo. She mentions that it's a pretty old song and that it has one part in the choreography. She states that she thought it would be perfect for like a duo so she thought, "I want to do it with you, together!"

The part of the choreography begins! The duo screams and laughs. "That was so much fun!" states Bae. "I really wanted to do it, thank you!" Kiara states and Bae says thank you! Kiara then mentions she has also prepared a little game for them.

"A game?" Bae asks. Kiara states "A game of... Camera rules!" She exclaims that there's so many cameras and she would like to make use of it. She mentions that they will play a game where Bae has to find the camera. They both are confused and ask each other, where is the camera. Both look for cameras and say Hi!

Kiara states that it was really difficult and states that it was fun and next camera! They continue to look for cameras and say Hi!

Both scream and exclaim together and find the cameras. Kiara says the game was fun.

It is not the end and both question what they will do next. Kiara mentions that the Berryz Kobo corner will continue for one more song because she loves them so much. She then states that she has four guests for the next one.

"Four?!" Bae asks. Kiara states that they are none other than Justice. She mentions that last year for the Easter Hello! Project cover song live she had them over but they were 2D, like in a paper form. So she thought this year she'll get them all in 3D!

"3D! Justice!" Bae replies. Kiara states that they will be wearing a little bit of a costume.

"A cosplay?" Bae asks, with Kiara confirming "cosplay" and "Costume play?". She mentions that it's a cosplay that matches the music video. She tells everyone to pay attention to what's different. She expresses to have fun with the rest of the show.

Then both state the next song, "Seishun Bus
